hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white

surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050505]/60 border-b border-white/5 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.card: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-[#111111] transition-colors duration-300
surfaces.button_primary: bg-white text-black font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-200 transition-all
surfaces.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-white/5 transition-all

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Premium cinematic hero. Large headline, subtle energy wave background, prominent stats.
sections.layout: Centered content over a cinematic 16:9 AI generated energy wave. 40% black overlay on image.

sections.name: Stats (The Scale)
sections.description: Bento-grid style metrics showcase ($2.8B, 214 Patents, etc).
sections.motion: Hover tracing beam or subtle lift.

sections.name: Core Expertise
sections.description: Showcase of Wireless Energy Harvesting (68% efficiency).
sections.layout: 50/50 split. Left: sticky typography. Right: Glowing 3D tech showcase image.

sections.name: Technologies Portfolio
sections.description: List of 30 technologies. Should use an editorial marquee or a dense technical grid.
sections.layout: Dense technical grid, exposing borders (border-collapse look). Very Swiss, very analytical.

sections.name: Leadership
sections.layout: 3-column grid. Grayscale images that gain color on hover.

sections.name: Partnerships & Contact
sections.layout: 2-column. Left: Trust markers & logos. Right: Premium dark-themed form.

hero_bg.placement: Hero Section Background (requires bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text visibility)

core_expertise_img.placement: Core Expertise Section right side image

server_room.placement: Timeline section background or general atmospheric texture

technical_rules.accessibility: Ensure all text meets APCA contrast guidelines. Add data-testid attributes to all interactive and structural elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a monolithic, cinematic dark theme suited for a $2.8B deep-tech company. Rely heavily on typography (Cabinet Grotesk/Satoshi) and negative space. Do not use generic Shadcn cards for the main layout; build custom HTML/Tailwind structures (bento grids, brutalist layouts) and only use Shadcn components for the contact form and interactive micro-components. Ensure the hero image has a heavy black overlay (e.g. bg-black/60) so text remains readable. For the leadership photos, apply a grayscale filter that turns colorful on hover. Remember to include standard SVGs for partner logos like Temasek and SoftBank if image assets are not strictly provided.
